con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="ConsultaCdaServiceService" targetNamespace="http://ws.ajuizamento.da.pge.prodesp.sp.gov.br/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://ws.ajuizamento.da.pge.prodesp.sp.gov.br/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:ns1="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"> <wsdl:types> <xs:schema elementFormDefault="unqualified" targetNamespace="http://ws.ajuizamento.da.pge.prodesp.sp.gov.br/" version="1.0" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="consultarCDA" type="tns:consultarCDA"/> <xs:element name="consultarCDAResponse" type="tns:consultarCDAResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="consultarCDA"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="mensagemRequisicao" type="tns:mensagemRequisicaoConsultaCda"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="mensagemRequisicaoConsultaCda"> <xs:complexContent> <xs:extension base="tns:mensagemRequisicao"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="chave" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="cpf" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="nome" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tipoConsulta" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="mensagemRequisicao"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="credencial" type="tns:credencial"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="credencial"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="deUsuario" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="deSenha" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarCDAResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:mensagemRetornoAjuizamento"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="mensagemRetornoAjuizamento"> <xs:complexContent> <xs:extension base="tns:mensagemRetorno"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="cdRetorno" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="deRetorno" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="mensagemRetorno"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="codigoRetorno" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricaoRetorno" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="consultarCDA"> <wsdl:part element="tns:consultarCDA" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="consultarCDAResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:consultarCDAResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="ConsultaCdaService"> <wsdl:operation name="consultarCDA"> <wsdl:input message="tns:consultarCDA" name="consultarCDA"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:consultarCDAResponse" name="consultarCDAResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="ConsultaCdaServiceServiceSoapBinding" type="tns:ConsultaCdaService"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="consultarCDA"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="consultarCDA"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="consultarCDAResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="ConsultaCdaServiceService"> <wsdl:port binding="tns:ConsultaCdaServiceServiceSoapBinding" name="ConsultaCdaServicePort"> <soap:address location="http://10.199.11.6:80/dividaativa/ws/debito/ajuizamento/consultarCDA"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>
